name.ja: <ruby>霊<rt>れい</rt></ruby><ruby>体<rt>たい</rt></ruby><ruby>化<rt>か</rt></ruby>の<ruby>鍛<rt>たん</rt></ruby><ruby>錬<rt>れん</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: During a turn you have not activated "Spiritualization Training", reveal 2 monsters with the same Attribute in your hand.

effect.en: Add 1 Spellcaster Type monster with 500 or 1900 ATK and 1500 DEF, and/or 1 Level 4 monster with 1500 ATK/200 DEF, with the same Attribute as the monsters revealed to meet the requirement from your Graveyard to your hand.
